title: ZAI-89 visual QA — /inbox/mine ru+en screenshots
description:
## Goal

Capture visual proof that ZAI-89 (StatusBadge + KeyboardShortcuts + SidebarAgents + Inbox i18n leaks) is correctly localized at the user-visible level. The committed code in [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89) is verified i18n-only by `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh` and CEO code review, but acceptance criteria require screenshot proof on the running dev server.

## Reproduction steps

1. Bring up the local dev server (`pnpm -C ui dev`) — the project workspace for this issue inherits ZAI-89's checkout, so the relevant commits (`cbe1efc9`, `db22a5ce`) are already in the working tree.
2. Open `http://127.0.0.1:3105/SDF/inbox/mine` in a browser.
3. Toggle UI language to `ru` via the language switcher in the top-right.
4. Capture the following screenshots:
   - **`inbox-mine-ru.png`** — full `/inbox/mine` page, Russian. Status badges (Todo/В работе/На проверке/Готово/Заблокировано/etc.) MUST render in Russian. No English text in any visible badge, sidebar, or shortcut hint.
   - **`inbox-mine-en.png`** — same route, English. Confirm no rendering artifacts (missing keys appearing as `status_labels.todo`, etc.).
   - **`keyboard-shortcuts-ru.png`** — open the keyboard shortcuts cheatsheet (press `?`) in Russian. Confirm dialog title, section headers, and `then` separator are translated.
   - **`keyboard-shortcuts-en.png`** — same dialog, English.
   - **`sidebar-agents-ru.png`** — sidebar Agents section visible. If feasible, hover over an agent to show the more-actions menu (Edit/Pause/Resume) in Russian.
5. Attach all five PNGs to this issue using `POST /api/companies/:companyId/issues/:issueId/attachments`.

## Acceptance

- 5 screenshots attached.
- A short comment listing what you observed: any English leaks remaining? any missing-key fallbacks visible?
- If a leak is found, name the file/route in your comment so the CEO can decide whether to reopen ZAI-89 or accept it as out-of-scope.

No code changes are expected. If you spot a residual hardcode, do **not** patch it here — report it and the CEO will dispatch a follow-up i18n issue.

issue.title: ZAI-88-A5: i18n global utility leaks (StatusBadge + KeyboardShortcuts + Sidebar tail)
ZAI-89 follow-up: 'PROJECTS' sidebar section header still English in RU
Inbox approval-notification i18n: subject prefix, status label, relative time

comment.body: Final approval (stage 2 of 2) — approved as per the previous comment.
